createdAt.description: The timestamp when the gateway was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the gateway was last updated.

statusReasons.description: The reasons for the current status of the gateway.

roleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role associated with the gateway.

protocolConfiguration.description: The configuration settings for the protocol used by the gateway.

authorizerType.description: The type of authorizer used by the gateway.

authorizerConfiguration.description: The authorizer configuration for the created gateway.

kmsKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the KMS key used to encrypt data associated with the gateway.

interceptorConfigurations.description: The list of interceptor configurations for the created gateway.

workloadIdentityDetails.description: The workload identity details for the created gateway.

exceptionLevel.description:
The level of detail in error messages returned when invoking the gateway.

  • If the value is DEBUG, granular exception messages are returned to help a user debug the gateway.

  • If the value is omitted, a generic error message is returned to the end user.

gatewayArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the gateway.

targetId.description: The unique identifier of the created target.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the target was created.

statusReasons.description: The reasons for the current status of the target.

credentialProviderConfigurations.description: The credential provider configurations for the target.

memory.description: The details of the created memory, including its ID, ARN, name, description, and configuration settings.

clientSecretArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the client secret in AWS Secrets Manager.

name.description: The name of the OAuth2 credential provider.

credentialProviderArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the OAuth2 credential provider.

callbackUrl.description: Callback URL to register on the OAuth2 credential provider as an allowed callback URL. This URL is where the OAuth2 authorization server redirects users after they complete the authorization flow.

oauth2ProviderConfigOutput.description: Contains the output configuration for an OAuth2 provider.

workloadIdentityArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the workload identity.

allowedResourceOauth2ReturnUrls.description: The list of allowed OAuth2 return URLs for resources associated with this workload identity.

exceptionLevel.description:
The level of detail in error messages returned when invoking the gateway.

  • If the value is DEBUG, granular exception messages are returned to help a user debug the gateway.

  • If the value is omitted, a generic error message is returned to the end user.

gatewayArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the gateway.
